ddls:
CREATE TABLE "matches" (
  "match_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each match */,
  "match_date" TEXT /* Date the match was played */,
  "home_team" INTEGER /* ID of the home team */,
  "away_team" INTEGER /* ID of the away team */,
  "match_result" TEXT /* Result of the match (e.g., win, loss, draw) */,
  "venue" TEXT /* The stadium where the match was played */,
  "referee" TEXT /* The name of the referee officiating the match */,
  "attendance" INTEGER /* The number of spectators at the match */,
  "weather" TEXT /* Weather conditions during the match (e.g., sunny, rainy, snowy) */,
  "match_status" TEXT /* Status of the match (e.g., completed, postponed, abandoned) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("match_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_matches_away_team FOREIGN KEY ("away_team") REFERENCES teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_matches_home_team FOREIGN KEY ("home_team") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "teams" (
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team */,
  "team_name" TEXT /* Name of the team */,
  "league" TEXT /* League the team plays in */,
  "coach" TEXT /* Name of the team coach */,
  "founded" TEXT /* The year the team was founded */,
  "stadium" TEXT /* The home stadium of the team */,
  "capacity" INTEGER /* The capacity of the home stadium */,
  "website" TEXT /* The official website of the team */,
  "social_media" TEXT /* Social media handles of the team */,
  "team_logo" TEXT /* URL or path to the team's logo */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "players" (
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player */,
  "player_name" TEXT /* Name of the player */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team the player belongs to */,
  "position" TEXT /* Position of the player (e.g., goalkeeper, defender, midfielder, forward) */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* The date of birth of the player */,
  "nationality" TEXT /* The nationality of the player */,
  "height" REAL /* The height of the player in meters */,
  "weight" REAL /* The weight of the player in kilograms */,
  "preferred_foot" TEXT /* The player's preferred foot (left, right, both) */,
  "injury_status" TEXT /* Current injury status of the player (e.g., fit, injured, suspended) */,
  "player_photo" TEXT /* URL or path to the player's photo */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_players_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "match_statistics" (
  "stat_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each match statistic */,
  "match_id" INTEGER /* ID of the match */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player */,
  "fantasy_points" INTEGER /* Fantasy points earned by the player */,
  "user_rating" REAL /* User rating for the player's performance */,
  "our_rating" INTEGER /* Rating from our expert analysts */,
  "your_rating" INTEGER /* Your rating for the player's performance */,
  "goals_scored" INTEGER /* Number of goals scored by the player in the match */,
  "assists" INTEGER /* Number of assists made by the player in the match */,
  "yellow_cards" INTEGER /* Number of yellow cards received by the player */,
  "red_cards" INTEGER /* Number of red cards received by the player */,
  "minutes_played" INTEGER /* Number of minutes the player was on the field */,
  "shots_on_target" INTEGER /* Number of shots on target by the player */,
  "pass_accuracy" REAL /* Pass accuracy percentage of the player */,
  "tackles" INTEGER /* Number of tackles made by the player */,
  "interceptions" INTEGER /* Number of interceptions made by the player */,
  "fouls_committed" INTEGER /* Number of fouls committed by the player */,
  "saves" INTEGER /* Number of saves made by the player (for goalkeepers) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stat_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_match_statistics_match_id FOREIGN KEY ("match_id") REFERENCES matches ("match_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_match_statistics_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_ratings" (
  "rating_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user rating */,
  "match_id" INTEGER /* ID of the match */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user providing the rating */,
  "rating" REAL /* Rating provided by the user */,
  "rating_date" TEXT /* The date the rating was provided */,
  "comments" TEXT /* Additional comments or feedback provided by the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("rating_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_ratings_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_ratings_match_id FOREIGN KEY ("match_id") REFERENCES matches ("match_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_ratings_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., analyst, coach, admin) */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* The phone number of the user */,
  "address" TEXT /* The address of the user */,
  "joined_date" TEXT /* The date the user joined the platform */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* The date of the user's last login */,
  "profile_picture" TEXT /* URL or path to the user's profile picture */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Detailed permissions assigned to the user, such as read, write, delete, etc. */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)
